title: cracca tenuis
intro: Cracca tenuis, also known as Slender Lupine or Pea Shore, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cracca tenuis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Cracca tenuis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine for various purposes.
